description_long: This is a pair of modern, sporty sunglasses with a robust, rectangular frame and slightly curved temples for a secure fit. The frame is thick and full-rimmed, providing complete support around the dark-tinted lenses. The lenses are large, offering ample coverage and protection from sunlight, and have a uniform dark tint. The temples are straight with a gentle curve at the ends and feature a visible white logo or insignia on the outer side. The bridge is solid and integrated into the frame, with no visible nose pads, giving it a streamlined appearance. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for urban environments and active lifestyles.
description: A pair of sporty, rectangular sunglasses with dark lenses and a thick, full-rim frame featuring a white logo on the temples.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular shape, thick frame, and large dark lenses.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the curved temple and visible white logo on the outer arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the inside of the frame and the curvature of the temples.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view with the logo on the other temple and the frame's thickness.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, thick, full-rim frame with a robust and sporty appearance. The temples are straight with a gentle curve at the ends, and the bridge is integrated into the frame for a seamless look.
attribute_lens_tint: Uniform dark gray tint with high opacity, providing strong sun protection. No gradient or mirrored effect is visible.
attribute_bridge_style: Solid, integrated bridge with a straight, sturdy design and no visible nose pads.
attribute_temple_detailing: Temples are thick and straight with a gentle curve at the tips, featuring a prominent white logo or insignia on the outer side. No additional patterns or engravings are visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A white logo or insignia is visible on the outer side of both temples, printed or painted onto the surface. The specific brand name is not identifiable from the images.
